original_image_tags: Document is a typed checklist on dark paper with white text. Two hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, stencil-like letters at the top center and again at the bottom right. There is a small handwritten marking in the bottom right corner below the stamp that appears to read "12-".

elements.description: A typed document titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' dated 20 July 1947, Incident # 57. It contains a numbered list of 26 fields detailing a UAP observation near Sidney, Newfoundland. The text 'RESTRICTED' is stamped at the top and bottom of the page. There are no photographs, sketches, or diagrams present.
